feed.title: Studies in Hispanic and Lusophone Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Studies in Hispanic and Lusophone Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Linguistic identity in the Portuguese language program at the University of São Tomé and Príncipe
entry.summary: Authors: Ana Lívia Agostinho, Ariele Helena Holz Nunes, Moara Zambonim DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/shll-2026-2001 Pages: Page range: 1-51

entry.title: Accusative versus dative agreement in Spanish: the salience of the initiator as a factor in morphological variation
entry.summary: Authors: Miguel A. Aijón Oliva DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/shll-2026-2002 Pages: Page range: 53-80

entry.title: L1 Turkish learners of Spanish and the interpretation of verbal moods: a close replication of Kanwit and Geeslin (2014)
entry.summary: Authors: Aarnes Gudmestad, Şebnem Yalçın, Amanda Edmonds DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/shll-2026-2003 Pages: Page range: 81-118

entry.title: Subject expression and position with the verb formdize/dice‘says’ in Spanish: a diachronic study
entry.summary: Authors: Peter Herbeck, Pekka Posio DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/shll-2026-2004 Pages: Page range: 119-145

entry.title: ¿Andé o anduve? Regularization of preteritandarin Spain
entry.summary: Authors: Andrea Hernández Hurtado, Matthew Kanwit DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/shll-2026-2005 Pages: Page range: 147-178

entry.title: Reflexivity in Portuguese Formulaic Language. Variation and Stability in Response to Linguistic Experience
entry.summary: Authors: Konrad Szcześniak, Myron Tsikandilakis, Marcia dos Santos Machado Vieira, Romina Leonor Toranzos, Pâmela Fagundes Travassos, Ivona Dömischová DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/shll-2026-2006 Pages: Page range: 179-211
